texto: They say that to escape reality is when you sleep, but when you sleep your sub conscious is in control of your dreams. For me to escape reality is when I read and write. When I read the world around me doesn't exist. The world in the story does and when I write I'm in control. Think of it as the author is the god of the world that they created. They set the characters fate.
explicacao: Citação de Emily aka xXxWhitelipsxXx sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They say that to escape reality is when you sleep, but when you sleep your sub conscious is in co…” articula reflexao, control, escape-from-reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como escape-from-reality e fate.
